samples:
I had to say goodbye
To the one I love
And left her crying
She said "Don't ever come near me"


Her name was Emma
The year is now 2017
Summer is coming and winter is here
No reason whatsoever, she wept alone


Once she looked into my eyes, suddenly it went black again
She asked if I loved her
When I told her that I did, tears fell from her eyes



Her name was Emma
The year is now 2017
Summer is coming and winter is here
No reason whatsoever, she wept alone


Once she looked into my eyes, suddenly it went black again
She asked if I loved her
When I told her that I did, tears fell from her eyes

Her name was Emma
The year is now 2017
Summer is coming and winter is here
No reason whatsoever, she wept alone


Once she looked into my eyes, suddenly it went black again
She asked if I loved her
When I told her that I did, tears fell from her eyes

In my search for the meaning of life
I found that God is watching us
A father to his children
And a judge to all mankind


"Carry me home"
Yes, I know when I die I shall go away
But at present time we're stuck in this maze"


As long as man and woman meet again
The devil is waiting for you there
He whispers into your ear
His words are clear: "Don't leave"
Even if it should last forever


"Carry me home"
Yes, I know when I die I shall go away
But at present time we're stuck in this maze"
Lost soul in vain
Slave to the sin of lust



"Carry me home"
Yes, I know when I die I shall go away
But at present time we're stuck in this maze"
Lost soul in vain
Slave to the sin of lust


Carry me home.. carry me home... Carry me home

Sleep and see me in the morning, I would love to hear you sing
Take my breath away with your laughter, make this moment shine
Don't ever leave now, don't ever leave again


A thousand years from now, when we are long gone
I will remember how many times you said "I love"
Still wondering if I really meant it or not

Ghost of a smile on your face, faded like sunlight
You held my hand so tight for such a short while
Still waiting round here after all

Lost myself along the way; never found it again
Once upon a time there was... no rhyme or reason why
So tired but you didn't care at all


Ghost of a smile on your face, faded like sunlight
You held my hand so tight for such a short while
Still waiting round here after all


There was an ocean between us
The moon reflected upon you
And I stood underneath the trees
And watched as you went

Time is running near
You are sleeping, my dear
And I can't forget the words that you said
A new year is here


Once upon a time, when we were young
We would sing and dance
But now it all went wrong
Still love me the same?
The moon rose higher


Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh


White lies, deception
An illusion for the sake of friendship
I guess she was lonely too long
She lost her pride


There is nothing left to say
No reason whatsoever to get back in touch
It used to be so bright
Her name was on everyone's lips
Once upon a time
Love grew old and died alone


Ah, oh, oh, oh, oh
Ah, oh, oh, oh, oh
Ah, oh, oh, oh, oh
Ah, oh, oh, oh, oh

She said, "Don't leave"
I said, "Go away"
It's been too long since I've seen you
When we met, you lied
You told me our love would survive
We spoke the same language
Out of sight in this maze alone
Lost all trace
Can not forget
Never wanted to
Lost all trace
Can not forget
Never wanted to
Ahhhhhhhhhh


Now we're old friends (old friends)
Still talk about what went wrong
Once so lost, now found again
Found a way to move along
Remember when you said that if I stay, you stay
We talked through tears and laughter
Said you loved us both the same
Lost all trace
Can not forget
Never wanted to
Lost all trace
Can not forget
Never wanted to

LOST ALL TRACE CAN NOT FORGET NEVER WANTED TO...

Lost all trace
Can not forget
Never wanted to

Lost all trace
Can not forget
Never wanted to

Blank stare into empty space
Dying wish to bid farewell
Sorrow for all that was lost
Icy roads beneath me burn


Lost myself in the fog of despair
Blind devotion stuck on repeat
Losing sight, losing faith
All I have is my pride and pride alone


Old wounds are festering again
Revisiting memories I left alone
Waiting for my name
To be called by their masters


Lost myself in the fog of despair
Blind devotion stuck on repeat
Losing sight, losing faith
All I have is my pride and pride alone

Lost myself in the fog of despair
Blind devotion stuck on repeat
Losing sight, losing faith
All I have is my pride and pride alone

Lost myself in the fog of despair
Blind devotion stuck on repeat
Losing sight, losing faith
All I have is my pride and pride alone

Lost myself in the fog of despair
Blind devotion stuck on repeat
Losing sight, losing faith
All I have is my pride and pride alone

As the clouds of dust arise
The rain falls on me and I sink to the ground
A river flows into my veins
I rose from sleep with a warning on the wind


Don’t cry for me
Don’t cry for me




Lost in thought alone once again
Waiting here stuck inside my skin
Searching through every word to understand what was meant by their words
It all made sense then



Lost along life’s highway until now, lost along life's highway until now
Lost along life’s highway until now, lost along life's highway until now
Lost along life's highway until now, lost along life's highway until now
Lost along life's highway until now, lost along life's highway until now
Lost along life's highway until now, lost along life's highway until now
Lost along life's highway until now, lost along life's highway until now
Lost along life's highway until now, lost along life's highway until now

This is a song about the loss of innocence through childhood trauma and subsequent disillusionment with life.
Lost in the fog, wandering round astray
All alone, without a soul to trust your way
Soul in flames, burning low against the wall
Blank stare into empty space, it's getting worse and I feel so small


It hurts me inside when I see their ways
Take advantage while they can
Out for themselves, leaving everyone else
Crying out loud "why"


The devil spoke and said "it's over"

Leave them be until morning comes along
Let them sleep away this final night
Don't say a word now but leave
Their lonely plight
Carry on until dawn reveals what's wrong...

Lost in the fog, wandering round astray
All alone, without a soul to trust your way
Soul in flames, burning low against the wall
Blank stare into empty space, it's getting worse and I feel so small


Lost in the fog, wandering round astray
All alone, without a soul to trust your way
Soul in flames, burning low against the wall
Blank stare into empty space, it's getting worse and I feel so small

Once you leave, I am left alone again
Trying to move on with life but stuck in the rain
Still trying to ease this pain
But every time you lie and say "I love you"
You leave me here all torn apart


Don't forget me now, don't ever leave my side
We are meant to be together 'til the end of time
Stay close by and never leave
Love of my life - please stay forever


Time is slipping away
Gone before it began
Please don't disappear
Even though we try to forget



Lost along the way
Found myself so afraid
Would have given anything for nothing less
Lost the only friend I had
The reason why I was born
All this came crumbling down around me




Ghosting round my head is stuck inside my brain
Searing through my skin with their pale faces strained
They laugh at me as they pass
And whisper names behind closed doors: The moon of Winter
Never rose this year because it promised nothing




I pray to God above and I speak your name
Forgive me lord of light once again I pray
This test I will not pass
And should I fall from grace please prepare my final day

I will hold my breath until you leave
When you're gone I wait for less of your time
Even less from the lips of believers
Until all that remains is dust in the wind



Lost inside the maze of despair
Once it was my home, now there's nothing there
Still haunt me when I try to forget
And cast aside these memories instead


Lost inside the maze of despair
Once it was my home, now there's nothing there
Still haunt me when I try to forget
And cast aside these memories instead

Time waits for no one but me and you
It counts the days until we meet again
Then asks why don't we live forever?
Have mercy on us both!




Lost inside the maze of despair
Once it was my home, now there's nothing there
Still haunt me when I try to forget
And cast aside these memories instead

Lost inside the maze of despair
Once it was my home, now there's nothing there
Still haunt me when I try to forget
